command:

fa=' '.join(open('docs/governance/runtime-treatment-census-final-analysis-2026-07-11.md',encoding='utf-8').read().split())
assert '0 dispositions' in fa and 'merge_candidate' in fa and 'human_summary.py' in fa, 'candidate ledger not corrected'
assert '33 × keep_observe, 0 retire, 0 merge' not in fa, 'flattened claim still present'
assert 'coverage-accounting gap' in fa and 'name-coverage' not in fa and 'named' in fa
cc=open('docs/governance/runtime-treatment-census-unit-canonical-closeout-2026-07-11.md',encoding='utf-8').read()
assert 'Coverage-accounting note' in cc and 'keep' in cc and 'not' in cc
ts5=open('docs/governance/runtime-treatment-census-human-summary-tranche-5-2026-07-11.md',encoding='utf-8').read()
assert 'merge_candidate' in ts5
print('reconciliation verified: merge_candidate surfaced, flattened claim removed, canonical-closeout aligned to keep with accounting note')
"
cannot_claim: semantic correctness of the tested behavior
receipt authenticity: every field is fabricatable by a direct writer
